use_cases: Displaying flight booking confirmation details with passenger information
Creating travel itinerary summary cards for booking applications
Presenting boarding pass visual representations for airline apps
Building flight confirmation UIs for travel e-commerce platforms
ai_summary: A flight ticket card component that displays departure and arrival airport codes and names, formatted flight date and time, passenger names with types and baggage info, and a decorative barcode stub section. Built with Tailwind CSS and shadcn/ui design patterns, featuring framer-motion animations for smooth entrance effects. Uses a rounded card container with shadow and CSS variable theming for consistent styling across applications.
